content.explanation:
**Had To / Will Have To — Past & Future Obligation:**

"Have to" का past और future form:
• **Had to** = Past obligation (करना पड़ा था)
• **Will have to** = Future obligation (करना पड़ेगा)

**HAD TO (Past — सभी subjects के साथ same):**
🇮🇳 मुझे कल रात देर तक काम करना पड़ा।
🇬🇧 I **had to** work late last night.

🇮🇳 उसे doctor के पास जाना पड़ा।
🇬🇧 She **had to** go to the doctor.

**WILL HAVE TO (Future obligation):**
🇮🇳 तुम्हें कड़ी मेहनत करनी पड़ेगी।
🇬🇧 You **will have to** work hard.

🇮🇳 अगर traffic रहा, तो हमें जल्दी निकलना पड़ेगा।
🇬🇧 If there is traffic, we **will have to** leave early.

**Negative:**
• Did not have to = past में ज़रूरी नहीं था
• Will not have to = future में ज़रूरी नहीं होगा
rules: Had to + V1 = past obligation (all subjects: I/he/she/we/they + had to)
Will have to + V1 = future obligation (all subjects)
Negative past: did not have to + V1 (past was optional)
Negative future: will not have to + V1 (future will be optional)
Question past: Did you have to...? / Did she have to...?
Question future: Will I have to...? / Will she have to...?
"Had to" replaces "must" in past tense (must has no past form)
content.memoryTrick:
**Must → Had To (Past) → Will Have To (Future)**
'Must' present के लिए है; Past में 'had to'; Future में 'will have to'। यह obligation का पूरा family है!

examples.english: He had to go to Delhi suddenly.
We had to stay up all night.
Did you have to give the exam?
You will have to buy a new laptop.

examples.hindi: अगर बारिश रही, तो plan बदलना पड़ेगा।
examples.english: If it rains, we will have to change the plan.

examples.hindi: उसे कल exam नहीं देना पड़ा।
examples.english: He did not have to give the exam yesterday.

mistakes.why: 'Must' has no past form — use 'had to' for past obligation

speakingTips: Past stories: 'Last week I had to work on Sunday because of the deadline.'
Future plans: 'If I want to get promoted, I will have to improve my skills.'
Empathy: 'You had to handle so much alone — I appreciate your effort.'

vocabulary.example: There was an urgent need — I had to leave.
Change is inevitable — you will have to adapt.
She had to cope with many challenges.
I will have to meet the deadline.
He had to sacrifice his holidays for work.

practice.hindi: कल मुझे रात को देर तक काम करना पड़ा।
practice.english: Yesterday I had to work late at night.
alternatives: i had to stay up late working yesterday.

practice.hindi: उसे डॉक्टर के पास जाना पड़ा।
practice.english: She had to go to the doctor.
alternatives: she was forced to visit the doctor.

practice.hindi: हमें बारिश में बाहर जाना पड़ा।
practice.english: We had to go out in the rain.
alternatives: we had to step out in the rain.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम्हें कल उठना पड़ा?
practice.english: Did you have to wake up yesterday?
alternatives: did you have to get up early yesterday?
practice.hint: Did you have to + base verb ?

practice.hindi: उसे ऑफिस में देर तक रुकना पड़ा।
practice.english: He had to stay late in the office.
alternatives: he had to work overtime.

practice.hindi: मुझे अपनी पुरानी नौकरी छोड़नी पड़ी।
practice.english: I had to leave my old job.
alternatives: i had to quit my previous job.

practice.hindi: उन्हें पूरी रात जागना पड़ा।
practice.english: They had to stay awake all night.
alternatives: they had to stay up the whole night.

practice.hindi: वह आज काम पर नहीं जा सका।
practice.english: He did not have to go to work today.
alternatives: he didn't have to work today.

practice.hindi: परीक्षा में फेल होने के कारण उसे दोबारा पढ़ना पड़ा।
practice.english: Because of failing the exam, he had to study again.
alternatives: he had to repeat studying after failing the exam.

practice.hindi: मुझे सब कुछ शुरू से शुरू करना पड़ा।
practice.english: I had to start everything from scratch.
alternatives: i had to begin all over again.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें कल जल्दी आना होगा।
practice.english: You will have to come early tomorrow.
alternatives: you will need to arrive early tomorrow.

practice.hindi: उसे यह परीक्षा फिर से देनी होगी।
practice.english: She will have to take this exam again.
alternatives: she will need to appear in the exam again.

practice.hindi: हमें नए नियमों का पालन करना होगा।
practice.english: We will have to follow the new rules.
alternatives: we will need to obey new regulations.

practice.hindi: क्या मुझे ज़्यादा मेहनत करनी होगी?
practice.english: Will I have to work harder?
alternatives: will i need to put in more effort?

practice.hindi: उसे नया घर खरीदना होगा।
practice.english: He will have to buy a new house.
alternatives: he will need to purchase a new home.

practice.hindi: अगर वह पास नहीं हुआ तो उसे दोबारा पढ़ना होगा।
practice.english: If he does not pass, he will have to study again.
alternatives: if he fails, he will have to repeat.
practice.hint: if + Simple Present + will have to

practice.hindi: नई पॉलिसी के तहत सबको रजिस्टर करना होगा।
practice.english: Under the new policy, everyone will have to register.
alternatives: all will have to register under the new policy.

practice.hindi: भविष्य में हमें और तकनीक सीखनी होगी।
practice.english: In the future, we will have to learn more technology.
alternatives: we will have to learn new technology in future.

practice.hindi: अगर पैसे नहीं बचाए तो बाद में दिक्कत होगी।
practice.english: If you do not save money, you will have to face problems later.
alternatives: not saving money will create problems later.

practice.hindi: क्या हमें शहर से बाहर जाना होगा?
practice.english: Will we have to go outside the city?
alternatives: will we need to leave the city?

practice.hindi: मुझे कल अस्पताल जाना होगा।
practice.english: I will have to go to the hospital tomorrow.
alternatives: i need to visit hospital tomorrow.

practice.hindi: पिछले हफ्ते हमें ट्रेन से जाना पड़ा।
practice.english: Last week we had to go by train.
alternatives: we had to travel by train last week.

practice.hindi: उसे माफ़ी माँगनी पड़ी।
practice.english: She had to apologize.
alternatives: she was forced to say sorry.

practice.hindi: अगले साल मुझे विदेश जाना होगा।
practice.english: Next year I will have to go abroad.
alternatives: i will have to travel overseas next year.

practice.hindi: हमें यह फ़ैसला जल्दी करना होगा।
practice.english: We will have to make this decision quickly.
alternatives: we will have to decide fast.
